episodes.title: Open Flame
episodes.description: Twelve chefs arrive at the volcanic landscape of Hawaii for the first extreme challenge: fire-only cooking.

episodes.title: Altitude Cuisine
episodes.description: The competition moves to a Colorado mountain camp at 12,000 feet — altitude changes everything.

episodes.title: Tidal Table
episodes.description: Contestants must forage tidal pools at dawn and cook before the tide returns.

episodes.title: Smoke & Salt
episodes.description: A 24-hour smoke challenge with no refrigeration and only locally sourced protein.

episodes.title: Speed Round
episodes.description: Twenty-minute lightning challenges test knife skills, flavor instinct, and composure.

episodes.title: Desert Heat
episodes.description: The Atacama Desert provides the most hostile kitchen environment yet — and the fewest ingredients.

episodes.title: Knife's Edge
episodes.description: A head-to-head elimination where two chefs cook the same protein, head-to-head.

episodes.title: The Blind Pantry
episodes.description: Contestants must build a full three-course meal from a pantry they've never seen.

episodes.title: Fire & Ice
episodes.description: One challenge uses live fire; the other uses only ice and acid. Both at the same time.

episodes.title: Final Course
episodes.description: The last two chefs face a seven-course tasting menu challenge before a panel of judges.

episodes.title: New Season, New Rules
episodes.description: Season two brings an entirely new format — team-based competition across continents.

episodes.title: Tokyo Night Market
episodes.description: Teams must cook using only ingredients available at a midnight Tokyo street market.

episodes.title: Farm to Fire
episodes.description: A 48-hour farm immersion in Tuscany — harvest, prep, and cook on a wood-fired hearth.

episodes.title: Spice Route
episodes.description: The teams split across Istanbul and Mumbai for a cross-cultural spice challenge.

episodes.title: Back to Basics
episodes.description: No appliances, no modern tools — only fire, stone, and water.

episodes.title: Pressure Test
episodes.description: An unexpected ingredient swap with 30 minutes to go throws every team's plan into chaos.

episodes.title: Continental Final
episodes.description: The top two teams face off in a three-round battle judged blind by an international panel.

episodes.title: The Crown
episodes.description: One team takes the title in a dramatic final elimination decided by a single dish.

extras.title: Chef Profiles
extras.description: Brief portraits of each season one contestant and their culinary background.

extras.title: Technique Breakdown
extras.description: Slow-motion footage of the most impressive cooking techniques from the season.
